about.summary: Hi! I'm Hilal Ozkan, a Backend Java Developer specializing in Spring Boot, REST APIs, Microservices. AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner. I'm curious, fast learner. That's a bit about me! I'm excited to hear more about what you're looking for
